# AWS Whitepapers
> This file provides structured access to AWS Whitepapers for large language models, which expand your knowledge of the cloud with AWS technical content authored by AWS and the AWS community.

## Whitepapers


- [ETSI NFVO Compliant Orchestration in the Kubernetes/Cloud Native World AWS Whitepaper](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/ETSI-NFVO-compliant-orchestration-in-kubernetes/ETSI-NFVO-compliant-orchestration-in-kubernetes.md): This whitepaper examines the network functions virtualization (NFV) orchestration requirements and specification as put forth by the European Telecommunication Standard Institute (ETSI), in the context of the Kubernetes way of orchestrating services and applications. [llms.txt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/ETSI-NFVO-compliant-orchestration-in-kubernetes/llms.txt)

- [Accenture Enterprise AI – Scaling Machine Learning and Deep Learning Models AWS Whitepaper](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/accenture-ai-scaling-ml-and-deep-learning-models/accenture-ai-scaling-ml-and-deep-learning-models.md): Today, there is a real-time, global, tectonic shift in the workplace caused by digital transformation. [llms.txt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/accenture-ai-scaling-ml-and-deep-learning-models/llms.txt)

- [Access Amazon WorkSpaces with Common Access Cards Installation Guide](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/access-workspaces-with-access-cards/access-workspaces-with-access-cards.md): This implementation guide provides step-by-step guidance for implementing pre-authorization and in-session CAC access by DoD personnel into WorkSpaces. [llms.txt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/access-workspaces-with-access-cards/llms.txt)

- [Accreditation Models for Secure Cloud Adoption AWS Whitepaper](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/accreditation-models-for-secure-cloud-adoption/accreditation-models-for-secure-cloud-adoption.md): Notice: This whitepaper has been archived.

- [Active Directory Domain Services on AWS AWS Whitepaper](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/active-directory-domain-services/active-directory-domain-services.md): Cloud is now the center of most enterprise IT strategies. [llms.txt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/active-directory-domain-services/llms.txt)

- [Advanced Multi-AZ Resilience Patterns Detecting and Mitigating Gray Failures](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/advanced-multi-az-resilience-patterns/advanced-multi-az-resilience-patterns.md): Many customers run their workloads in highly available, multi-Availability Zone (AZ) configurations. [llms.txt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/advanced-multi-az-resilience-patterns/llms.txt)

- [Amazon Aurora MySQL Database Administrator’s Handbook AWS Whitepaper](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/amazon-aurora-mysql-db-admin-handbook/amazon-aurora-mysql-db-admin-handbook.md): This paper outlines the best practices for managing database connections, setting server connection parameters, and configuring client programs, drivers, and connectors. [llms.txt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/amazon-aurora-mysql-db-admin-handbook/llms.txt)

- [Amazon Aurora MySQL Migration Handbook AWS Whitepaper](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/amazon-aurora-mysql-migration-handbook/amazon-aurora-mysql-migration-handbook.md): This paper provides best practices for planning, implementing, and troubleshooting database migrations from MySQL-compatible and non- MySQL-compatible database products to Amazon Aurora. [llms.txt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/amazon-aurora-mysql-migration-handbook/llms.txt)

- [Amazon CloudFront for Media AWS Whitepaper](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/amazon-cloudfront-media/amazon-cloudfront-media.md): This whitepaper is for media organizations interested in delivering streaming media content to their viewers using Amazon CloudFront. [llms.txt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/amazon-cloudfront-media/llms.txt)

- [Amazon Connect Data Lake Best Practices AWS Whitepaper](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/amazon-connect-data-lake-best-practices/amazon-connect-data-lake-best-practices.md): Abstract and introduction [llms.txt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/amazon-connect-data-lake-best-practices/llms.txt)

- [Amazon MSK Migration Guide AWS Whitepaper](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/amazon-msk-migration-guide/amazon-msk-migration-guide.md): This guide covers options for your Apache Kafka migration to Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka (Amazon MSK). [llms.txt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/amazon-msk-migration-guide/llms.txt)

- [Amdocs Digital Brand Experience Platform in AWS Cloud AWS Whitepaper](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/amdocs-digital-brand-experience-platform/amdocs-digital-brand-experience-platform.md): Notice: This whitepaper has been archived.

- [Amplify DataStore: Use Cases and Implementation AWS Whitepaper](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/amplify-datastore-implementation/welcome.md): Abstract [llms.txt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/amplify-datastore-implementation/llms.txt)

- [Applying Security Practices to a Network Workload on AWS for Communications Service Providers AWS Whitepaper](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/applying-security-practices-to-network-workload-for-csps/welcome.md): This whitepaper provides recommendations to Communication Service Providers (CSPs) on securing their telecommunications (telco) network workload on Amazon Web Services (AWS). [llms.txt](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/whitepapers/latest/applying-security-practices-to-network-workload-for-csps/llms.txt)
